boot.up: set -a; source /tmp/mio-e2e.env; set +a; docker compose -f deploy/local/docker-compose.yml --profile operator --profile media up -d
boot.down: docker compose -f deploy/local/docker-compose.yml --profile operator --profile media down

auth.notes: Decoupled single-origin stack: Caddy proxy on :18081 routes /api, /auth, /healthz -> mio-web-api:8080 and /* -> mio-web-frontend:80. MIO_WEB_AUTH_MODE=dev — the /login page links to /auth/login which (dev mode) creates an operator@localhost (credential-admin) session and 302s back to /. No real credentials. Same origin keeps the SameSite=Lax session cookie + Path=/auth/callback OAuth state cookie flowing; no CORS.
